title: A little confuse
wikitext:
[]: A little confuse. Post by ohnasti » Sat Nov 17, 2012 12:34 pm So did evangelion 3.33 came out in Japan or something? all this reviews and spoilers. Good, why did i even open them.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Nov 17, 2012 12:36 pm Yes. 3.0 was released in Japanese theaters about 26 hours ago.

[]: Post by ohnasti » Sat Nov 17, 2012 12:38 pm so you mean to tell me all the sht i seen is not "predictions" fuck me right?

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Nov 17, 2012 12:48 pm Correct. If you want to avoid ulterior spoilers, I suggest you avoid the Rebuild subforum altogether. Let's hope we get a copy soon!
